ddls:
CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "artist" TEXT /* Artist of the song */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album the song belongs to */,
  "album_uri" TEXT /* URI of the album */,
  "track" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the song */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability of the song (0-1) */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the song (0-1) */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Key of the song */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the song (dB) */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the song */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the song (0-1) */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the song (0-1) */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the song (0-1) */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness of the song (0-1) */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence of the song (0-1) */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the song (BPM) */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the song (ms) */,
  "time_signature" INTEGER /* Time signature of the song */,
  "decade_start" INTEGER /* Decade the song was released in */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the song */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the song */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song contains explicit content */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the song */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the artist */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the artist */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the artist has on the platform */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the artist's profile picture */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who released the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the album */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL of the album's cover art */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the album */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the album contains explicit content */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks in the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "privacy" TEXT /* Privacy status of the playlist (public/private) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the playlist was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the playlist was last updated */,
  "collaborative" INTEGER /* Indicates if the playlist is collaborative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_songs" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "added_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the song to the playlist */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the song was added to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_added_by FOREIGN KEY ("added_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "profile_bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the user */,
  "preferred_genres" TEXT /* User's preferred genres */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_artists" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "followed_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user followed the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_features" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability of the song (0-1) */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the song (0-1) */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Key of the song */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the song (dB) */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the song */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the song (0-1) */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the song (0-1) */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the song (0-1) */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness of the song (0-1) */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence of the song (0-1) */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the song (BPM) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended song */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the recommendation (0-1) */,
  "recommended_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "song_id")
)
column_names: Name of the album the song belongs to
Decade the song was released in

Number of followers the artist has on the platform
URL of the artist's profile picture
